title: A Retrieval-based Chatbot for Customer Service Using Large Language Model
author: University of Michigan
publisher: IEEE, 2024 International Conference on Future Technologies for Smart Society (ICFTSS)
points: Developed a retrieval-based chatbot leveraging large language models to enhance customer service interactions.
Implemented advanced natural language processing techniques to improve response accuracy and relevance.
Conducted extensive testing and evaluation to ensure optimal performance in real-world scenarios.

title: Effect of Training Content and Environment Factors on Resident Retention Rates
author: Tech Solutions Inc.
publisher: Journal of the Chinese Medical Association (JCMA)
points: Analyzed the impact of various training content and environmental factors on resident retention rates using statistical methods.
Utilized data visualization tools to present findings and support decision-making processes.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to implement strategies aimed at improving retention rates based on research outcomes.
label: NEW!
